scope_note: QA Orbit-Dirac Bracket Cert family [260]: backfills the ETCR/Dirac-bracket cross-map thread (commit aa2053c, 2026-04-20) with an explicit QA-native orbit-Dirac-bracket construction on S_9. Source grounding: Blaschke & Gieres, 'On the canonical formulation of gauge field theories and Poincare transformations,' Nucl. Phys. B 965 (2021), arXiv:2004.14406, eqs (5.32)-(5.39). Mannheim, 'Equivalence of light-front quantization and instant-time quantization,' Phys. Rev. D 102 025020 (2020), arXiv:1909.03548 — motivates the firewall / path-invariant framing. Cross-map at docs/theory/QA_QFT_ETCR_CROSSMAP.md §4.2 (MC-3, MC-4). Preliminary invariant script at docs/theory/empirical/etcr_t_invariant_check.py. Paper section docs/theory/../papers/in-progress/qft-etcr-orbit-quotient/section.md §4.4. Substrate: cert [191] Tiered Reachability. Delivers MC-4 of the cross-map: constraint-function family {phi_1 = b^2 - be - e^2 - 1, phi_2 = b - 1}, base bracket = symplectic lift of the tuple-wedge {(b1,e1),(b2,e2)} = b1*e2 - b2*e1 (prior-art C3 recast), X-matrix X_ab = [phi_a, phi_b] with det X = -(b+2e)^2, invertibility on the physical subspace verified at every witness as coprime-to-m, [F,G]_orbit instantiated for F=b and G=e (evaluates to 0 on physical subspace), strong-zero [phi_a, F]_orbit = 0 verified for F in {b,e}. Scope: m=9 only in v1; T_F(b,e) = (a1(b+e), b) dynamics with a1(x)=((x-1) mod m)+1. m=24 deferred — requires mixed I-level + period-n constraint family. Checks ODB_1+PHI/WIT_A1/WIT_PHYSICAL/X_MATRIX/INV/DB_BE_ZERO/STRONG_ZERO/SRC/WITNESS/F; 1 PASS + 1 FAIL; self-test ok. Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-21.
